name: BetterDealEnquiry
description: i want a deal, what can be offered to me, discuss deals

sampleUtterances.utterance: I'm out of contract and want to see what deals you have.
My contract is ending soon; what’s the best price to stay?
What are my renewal options?
I want to discuss a new deal before my current one expires.
Check my account for any re-contracting offers.
What offers do you have for customers finishing their term?
Can you match the promotional price offered to new customers?
I'm thinking of switching providers; can you give me a better deal?
I've found a cheaper deal elsewhere; what can you offer?
Give me a more competitive price on my current broadband.
Are there any special rates for existing subscribers?
I've been a loyal customer for years; do I qualify for a discount?
Are there any loyalty rewards available for my account?
I want to speak to the retention department about a better rate.
What are your best loyalty discounts right now?
I want a better deal on a faster broadband package.
Can I get a discount if I upgrade to 1Gb and Hub 5?
Look for better deals on my broadband and TV bundle.
What are the best offers for upgrading my speed?
I want to explore cheaper options for my Virgin subscription.
Look for a better deal.
check for cheaper plans on my account.
I want to lower my monthly bill.
Show me current promotions for my services.
Are there any deals available to reduce my costs?
